summary: SINGLE_FOCUS complex plane with primes on real axis: GREEN primes 5, 13, 17 (≡ 1 mod 4) split in Z[i], RED primes 3, 7, 11 (≡ 3 mod 4) stay inert. Animate the three splittings by drawing YELLOW arrows from the integer prime up to (a+bi) and down to (a-bi), with MathTex factorization equations (5=(2+i)(2-i), 13=(3+2i)(3-2i), 17=(4+i)(4-i)). BLUE caption notes 2 ramifies as -i(1+i)^2. Legend at top-left shows color coding.
